name: French Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with pepper and set aside.
2. Heat a large skillet coated with cooking spray over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Cook the chicken in the skillet until lightly browned, turning once.
4. Combine the soup, white wine, and mustard in a bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Serve the chicken and sauce over hot rice.
Microwave Oven Instructions:
1. Prepare the chicken as directed.
2. Combine the soup, white wine, and mustard in an 8x8x2-inch microwavable baking dish.
3. Cover with plastic wrap, venting one corner to allow steam to escape.
4. Cook on HIGH for 3 minutes or until bubbly.
5. Add the chicken; replace the plastic wrap and continue cooking on HIGH for 5 to 6 minutes.
6. Let stand for 10 minutes.
7. Serve the chicken and sauce over hot rice.
